name: TIBCO Spotfire Analytics API
what_it_does: TIBCO Spotfire Analytics REST API for embedded analytics, data visualization, and AI-driven predictive analytics. Enables AI agents to manage Spotfire report and dashboard embedding for application analytics integration, handle data connection and live data query for real-time analytics automation, access AI/ML predictive model integration for automated analytics insight generation, retrieve streaming analytics and real-time data processing for IoT and industrial analytics, manage user and permission management for enterprise analytics access control, handle data wrangling and transformation automation for analytics data preparation, access Spotfire Analyst report scheduling and distribution for automated analytics delivery, retrieve time series analysis and anomaly detection for operational analytics, manage pharmaceutical and life sciences analytics compliance for regulated analytics, and integrate Spotfire with TIBCO Data Virtualization, TIBCO Cloud, and enterprise data platforms.
use_cases: Embedding analytics from application development agents
Automating report distribution from analytics delivery agents
Processing streaming data from industrial IoT agents
Running predictive models from AI analytics agents
not_for: Simple BI dashboards without embedded analytics requirements
Small organizations without enterprise analytics infrastructure
Organizations using Tableau or Power BI exclusively
best_when: An enterprise, pharmaceutical company, or industrial manufacturer using TIBCO Spotfire wants AI agents to automate embedded analytics, predictive model deployment, streaming analytics, and report distribution.
avoid_when: 21 CFR PART 11 REGULATED ANALYTICS: Spotfire is heavily used in pharmaceutical and life sciences — automated analytics in validated environments must comply with 21 CFR Part 11 electronic records; analytical report generation outside validated workflow creates GxP compliance issues. TIBCO acquisition complexity — Vista Equity Partners acquired TIBCO (2014), then TIBCO merged with Cloud Software Group (2022); verify current Spotfire API stability and roadmap under Cloud Software Group ownership. Data security in regulated analytics — automated access to proprietary R&D and clinical trial data in Spotfire creates IP and data governance risk; automated analytics must implement minimum-necessary data access.

auth.notes: TIBCO Spotfire uses OAuth 2.0 and basic authentication. REST API and JavaScript API for embedding. Developer documentation at developer.spotfire.com. San Jose, California HQ (TIBCO/Cloud Software Group). Vista Equity Partners acquired TIBCO (2014). TIBCO merged with Citrix via Cloud Software Group (2022). Spotfire founded 1996. 12,000+ enterprise customers. Strong in pharma, energy, and industrial analytics. Competes with Tableau, Qlik, and SAS for enterprise analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; embedding license; analyst named user
pricing.notes: San Jose, CA. Cloud Software Group (formerly TIBCO). Founded 1996. 12,000+ enterprise customers. Pharma/energy/industrial analytics focus. Competes with Tableau and Qlik for enterprise analytics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per deployment; on-premises vs cloud differ

known_agent_gotchas: 21 CFR PART 11 GxP ANALYTICS: Pharmaceutical and life sciences Spotfire deployments for validated analytical environments must comply with 21 CFR Part 11 electronic records; automated analytical workflows outside validation change control create GxP audit findings

TIBCO/Cloud Software Group ownership transition — Vista Equity/Cloud Software Group ownership creates strategic uncertainty; verify Spotfire API roadmap, support commitment, and product direction under current ownership before long-term integration investment

Proprietary analytical IP protection — pharmaceutical R&D and clinical analytics in Spotfire contains highly sensitive competitive IP; automated analytics access must implement strict role-based access and audit logging

On-premises vs cloud deployment — Spotfire has on-premises (Spotfire Server) and cloud (TIBCO Cloud Spotfire) with different API endpoints and capabilities; verify target deployment before integration
Streaming analytics real-time requirements — Spotfire streaming analytics requires low-latency event processing; automated streaming workflows must implement proper backpressure and buffer management

Python and R model integration — Spotfire custom analytics requires server-side Python/R; automated model deployment must manage package dependencies and computational resource allocation on Spotfire Server
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise analytics. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Analytics and proprietary data. Regulated industry use.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise analytics. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Analytics and R&D data.
